company_name: 闻泰科技股份有限公司
notes: The official Wingtech site directly links the social and campus recruitment portals. The social portal timed out and no auditable server-rendered inventory or complete public job detail was obtained. No login, CAPTCHA, private API or access-control bypass was attempted.

company_name: 立讯精密工业股份有限公司
notes: The official Luxshare careers page directly links the HotJob social and campus portals. Public HTML exposes only a JavaScript application shell and no complete enumerable job records. No authenticated endpoint or access control was bypassed.

Official recruitment category pages were publicly reachable. Four aggregate social-recruitment categories were visible, but all showed a 2026-07-02 deadline and lacked individual current job details, responsibilities, requirements, education, experience and canonical application URLs. No expired aggregate category was promoted to JobImport.

company_name: 舜宇光学科技（集团）有限公司
notes: The official talent-recruitment table returned no visible rows but did not explicitly state that no openings exist. One indexed official detail URL was blank for title, location, department, dates, responsibilities and requirements, so it cannot support a job record or a final no-openings conclusion.
